macro.title: Mortgage rates are at yearly highs, but housing demand is still positive
macro.what: Pending sales rose to 78,006 and purchase apps rose 7% yearly, even as mortgage rates hit highs and yields neared 4.60%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: 2026 HousingWire Homebuilder rankings expand the scoreboard
macro.what: Up to now, homebuilding rankings have mostly answered two questions: who is bigger? And who is the biggest? They remain important questions
macro.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
macro.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: The Price Point: What $400,000 Buys in These Hot U.S. Neighborhoods
housing.what: In this edition of The Price Point—a weekly series where Redfin data journalists explore current housing inventory across a rotating combination of budgets and metro areas—we’re looking at some of the hottest real estate markets in the country, according to Redfin’s latest analysis
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: KBW says UWM is well positioned despite market pressures

notables.title: HUD audit warns that some HECM LESA accounts may run dry
notables.what: HUD OIG audit says 1,237 HECM borrowers may see LESA funds depleted about six years early, with up to $258 million at risk.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Real estate agents: Before you paste AI copy into the MLS, run this checklist
notables.what: Checklist for AI generated MLS remarks, avoid buyer profiling, remove coded terms, verify facts and add a required human approval step.
